data.name: Seed of the Dead: Sweet Home
data.detailed_description:
為了守護那個可愛的女孩子，把可恨的怪物殺掉！

在化為地獄的這個世界上，建立起和女主角們的愛之巢穴（Sweet Home）吧！　
圖像、遊戲份量、遊戲系統，然後慣例的那個……全部都威力加強了！

可以同時享受暴力滿載的殭屍FPS，和與女孩子們的溫馨的恩愛調情生活的世界末日後殭屍FPS美少女遊戲！

　

在一切都結束的世界開始的新生活。
接下來這世界會成為天堂，還是地獄，都看你決定……！？

在FPS形式的戰鬥中獲得道具及點數！

道具是在建築新的設施，點數是在購買新的技能等可以使用。
奮力的戰鬥，大力的賺取道具和點數，讓自己和城鎮成長吧！

在據點和女主角們交流吧！

若送給女主角們禮物的話，關係就會變好，會和你談天說話喔。
若關係變的親密的話她們在戰鬥中也一定會極為活躍！
一旦女主角的心意達到最高潮，就會發生加深關係，更加親近的事件。　
那會是對心愛的那女孩急速接近的大好機會！
　

女主角


紺堂光
笑容迷人的大家的領隊。
過去曾是田徑選手，她以那時培養的超群的運動神經和判斷力為武器，出生入死而活過來了。
無論是處與任何狀況臉上都掛著笑容的她，最近卻有時可以看到似乎想起了過去的事情般的表情……


加賀野綾
據點的風紀負責人。她是冷靜且可靠的年長的大姐姐。
她本來是擁有優秀的觀察力的醫學部學生，在據點也充分的發揮其知識和能力。
她深獲光她們信賴，在許多方面上參與城鎮的營運。


鈴音星彩
她是據點的吉祥物般的存在。
揮動著大大的槍，以壓倒性的火力將敵人全都擊倒。
雖然她以不會膽怯的個性，無論對手是誰都說著刻薄的話，但是因為她的容顏而被大家溺愛。


葉月一華
謎樣的貓耳連帽服狙擊手。
喜愛孤獨，絕對不會對他人敞開心胸的女孩子。
在她脫口而出所說的巨大的威脅，還有她自身的不為人知的秘密到底是……？
　

仕樣

  • 多樣性豐富的全部8個關卡。
  • 4人的魅力的女主角
  • 40種以上的和女主角的事件
  • 4階段的難易度
  • 30種以上的獨特的武器
  • 4種追加服裝
  • 100種以上的道具
  • 6階段以上的設施擴張
  • 50種以上的技能
  • 15～30小時的遊戲時間

data.short_description: 為了守護那個可愛的女孩子，把可恨的怪物殺掉！ 在化為地獄的這個世界上，建立起和女主角們的愛之巢穴（Sweet Home）吧！ 可以同時享受暴力滿載的殭屍FPS，和與女孩子們的溫馨的恩愛調情生活的世界末日後殭屍FPS美少女遊戲！
data.supported_languages:
日文*, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 韓文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, 8, 8.1, 10 64bit
  • 處理器: Quad-core Intel or AMD processor, 3.0 GHz or faster
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060, AMD Radeon RX 580 or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 20 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Integrated Sound Chip
  • 備註: 64bit OS required
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Seed of the Dead: Sweet Home
data.detailed_description:
Slaughter the ghouls to save the girls!

Build up your love nest and woo four heroines as you fight to survive a ruined zombie hellscape!
Upgraded graphics, more content, enhanced gameplay and yes, even more...'that'...a complete renewal of everything!

A one-of-a-kind Post apocalyptic FPS dating sim game filled with intense zombie killing action and lusty romance!



The end of the world has given you a shot at a new life.
Will you make your life a heaven, or be dragged down to the bowels of hell...?!

Earn points and items fighting in intense FPS combat!

Upgrade your base and buy new character skills by collecting items and points.
Blast away at zombies to rack up kills and create a whole new you!

Get tender with lovely heroines back at Home Base!

Give them presents and make conversation to build a relationship.
The closer you become, they more of them you will see out on the battlefield!
Then, once you win the affection of your favorite girl, unlock special intimate events
and really bring your relationship to the next level!
　

Heroines


Hikari Kondo
The bright and smiling leader of the bunch.
Physically and mentally fit, Her experiences as a track-and-field athlete have been the key to her survival.
She normally faces any challenge with a smile, but lately she appears distraught thinking about the past...


Aya Kagano
The discipline master of Home Town. The mature and reliable missus.
A former medical school student, she uses her cunning instinct and many talents to make Home Town a better place.
Trusted by her friends and colleagues, she fulfills many crucial roles in running Home Town.


Kirara Suzune
The popular face of the group.
wields a giant weapon capable of mowing down throngs of enemies with ease.
Beloved for her caustic in-your-face attitude, this girl doesn't back down from anything or anyone.


Ichika Hazuki
The Mysterious sniper in a cat ear hoodie.
A girl who doesn't open her heart to anyone and prefers fighting solo.
She rarely speaks except for when she's threatening others with violence. Could she be hiding something...?
　

Features

  • Eight high-powered stages
  • 4 gorgeous and delightful heroines
  • Over 40 different heroine interaction scenes
  • Four difficulty levels
  • More than 30 different types of weapons
  • Four types of bonus outfits
  • Over 100 different kinds of items
  • Expand your in-game hub with over 6 kinds of additions
  • More than 50 different trainable skills
  • 15~30 hours of play time

Japanese*, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Spanish - Spain, Korean, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7, 8, 8.1, 10 64bit
  • Processor: Quad-core Intel or AMD processor, 3.0 GHz or faster
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060, AMD Radeon RX 580 or higher
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 20 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Integrated Sound Chip
  • Additional Notes: 64bit OS required
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
